answer:
The void ratio \( e = 0.80 \) implies the total volume \( V_{\text{total}} = V_{\text{grains}} + V_{\text{voids}} = V_{\text{grains}}(1 + e) = 1.8 V_{\text{grains}} \).

The sand density is then:
\[
\rho_{\text{sand}} = \frac{\rho_{\text{SiO}_2} V_{\text{grains}}}{V_{\text{total}}} = \frac{2.600 \times 10^3}{1.8} \approx 1.44 \times 10^3 \, \text{kg/m}^3,
\]
which rounds to **1.4 × 10³ kg/m³**.

\boxed{A}
